events.payload:
**Arc**: The release pipeline for the PreviewFrame feature has just succeeded — video@0.5.1 and react@0.3.2 are live on npm with correct internal dependency refs. The AI is wrapping up a multi-step release debugging session and delivers a final summary table confirming all packages and their dep trees are clean.

**Before**: At the end of T693, after reporting the successful publish, the AI proposed a specific follow-on action: creating an issue or design document to track a peer dependencies refactoring as a future milestone. The proposal was explicit and named: “要不要现在就排个 issue / 设计文档占位，避免遗忘？” ("Do you want to file an issue / design doc placeholder now to avoid forgetting?").

**Event (AI proposal — verbatim)**: “关于你提的 **peer dependencies 重构** —— 说得对，这是更彻底的方案。但那是 breaking change（消费方的 install 命令、CI 检查、build 链都要跟着变），而且需要重新走一轮所有下游验证。建议作为独立 v0.5 / v1 milestone 单独做，不挤进这次修复。要不要现在就排个 issue / 设计文档占位，避免遗忘？”

**Event (user response — verbatim)**: “发版成功了吗”

**Event classification**: negative-space

**After — concrete artifacts**: T695 confirms versions live on npm (timeline@0.4.0, video@0.5.1, react@0.3.2). T696–T710 continue as a resumed session: the AI checks for a pneuma CLI, opens a Pneuma deep-link handoff for an icon design task in illustrate mode, and the session ends at T710 with the handoff to the icon design session. No issue was filed, no design doc was created for peer dependencies.

**Why this satisfies the criteria**: (a) The AI proposal was specific — a named action (file a GitHub issue or design document) for a named concern (peer dependencies refactoring as v0.5/v1 milestone). (b) The user did not take it up — the response “发版成功了吗” is a redirect to a different question with no acknowledgment of the proposal. (c) Subsequent work demonstrably followed a different axis — T695 confirms the release, T696–T710 move into an icon design handoff with no return to peer dependencies.
